summary: Iteration 66: Phase B Smart Data Caching - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend delta sync returns is_delta flag correctly, frontend offline indicator shows 'Auto-refreshes every 5 min' text when cache ready, org change detection and cache cleanup properly implemented.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - minor styling issue on initial render (known, pre-existing)

BACKEND_DELTA_SYNC.GET_pos_data_no_last_sync: PASS - Returns is_delta=false for full sync
BACKEND_DELTA_SYNC.GET_pos_data_with_last_sync: PASS - Returns is_delta=true for delta sync
BACKEND_DELTA_SYNC.delta_sync_filters_products: PASS - Filters products by updated_at/created_at >= last_sync
BACKEND_DELTA_SYNC.sync_time_returned: PASS - Valid ISO timestamp returned for client storage

FRONTEND_OFFLINE_DB.setOfflineOrg_org_change: PASS - Detects org change and calls clearOrgCache
FRONTEND_OFFLINE_DB.clearOrgCache_preserves_pending: PASS - Checks pending_sales count before deleting DB
FRONTEND_OFFLINE_DB.clearOrgCache_deletes_if_empty: PASS - Deletes DB only if pending_sales count is 0

FRONTEND_SYNC_MANAGER.stopAutoSync_cleanup: PASS - Clears autoSyncInterval, cacheRefreshInterval, and removes onReconnect listener
FRONTEND_SYNC_MANAGER.refreshPOSCache_uses_last_sync: PASS - Calls getMeta('last_sync') and passes as param

FRONTEND_OFFLINE_INDICATOR.auto_refresh_text_shown: PASS - Shows 'Auto-refreshes every 5 min' in ready state
FRONTEND_OFFLINE_INDICATOR.ready_state_ui: PASS - Shows 'Ready for offline', sync time, counts, and Re-sync now button

critical_code_review_comments: Phase B correctly implements 5-minute background cache refresh via cacheRefreshInterval with CACHE_REFRESH_MS constant
Org change detection in setOfflineOrg properly triggers clearOrgCache for previous org
clearOrgCache safely preserves pending_sales by checking count before delete
startAutoSync stores _onReconnect listener reference for proper cleanup in stopAutoSync
refreshPOSCache correctly passes last_sync param from getMeta for delta sync behavior
OfflineIndicator correctly handles background_refresh events silently (no UI interruption)
POSPage passes branch ID getter function to startAutoSync for dynamic branch reference

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Phase B UI elements and code paths verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 verified Phase B Smart Data Caching features. Key implementations: (1) Backend delta sync via last_sync param returns is_delta=true and filters products by timestamp, (2) Frontend offlineDB setOfflineOrg detects org changes and clears old cache (preserving pending sales), (3) syncManager startAutoSync sets up 5-minute cache refresh interval and accepts branch ID getter, (4) stopAutoSync properly cleans up all intervals and event listeners, (5) OfflineIndicator shows 'Auto-refreshes every 5 min' text and handles background_refresh events silently. Previous iteration 65 features (envelope_id idempotent sync, org-scoped IndexedDB) remain working.
